title: narcissus × montserratii var. vallrutae
intro: Narcissus × montserratii var. vallrutae, commonly known as Vallauris narcissus or Narcissus vallortum, is a rare and unique species of daffodil that is native to the Vallauris region in the south of France. As a medicinal plant, it is rich in alkaloids, including galantamine, which is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus × montserratii var. vallrutae include its potential to improve memory and cognitive function, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and capsules, with recommended dosages and uses varying depending on the specific preparation and intended health benefits.
